item.title: Has Balmer Lawrie Investment Ltd declared dividend?
item.description: Yes, Balmer Lawrie Investment Ltd has declared a dividend of 203%, amounting to ₹4.3 per share, with an ex-date of March 20, 2026. The company has demonstrated strong total returns over various periods, particularly in the long term. Time: Mar 17 2026 11:30 PM IST

item.title: Has REC Ltd declared dividend?
item.description: Yes, REC Ltd has declared a dividend of 32% (₹4.6 per share) with an ex-date of March 20, 2026, and a dividend yield of 6.02%. While recent total returns have been volatile, longer-term returns over 3 to 5 years show significant growth. Time: Mar 17 2026 11:30 PM IST

item.title: When is the next results date for Milestone Furniture Ltd?
item.description: The next results date for Milestone Furniture Ltd is 18 March 2026. Time: Mar 17 2026 11:15 PM IST

item.title: Arfin India Joins MomentumNow Stocks on Strong Financial Upswing
item.description: Arfin India, a micro-cap player in the non-ferrous metals sector, has been added to the MomentumNow Stocks list as of 17 March 2026, reflecting its robust financial performance and promising momentum. The stock’s recent surge in profitability and sales growth positions it as a compelling candidate for investors seeking dynamic opportunities within the momentum investing strategy. Time: Mar 17 2026 09:30 PM IST

item.title: Stallion India Fluorochemicals Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Bearish Trend
item.description: Stallion India Fluorochemicals Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting deteriorating momentum and raising concerns about the stock’s long-term strength. Time: Mar 17 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: Baazar Style Retail Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Baazar Style Retail Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average (DMA) crosses below the 200-DMA, signalling a potential shift towards a bearish trend. This development highlights a deterioration in the stock’s medium-term momentum and raises concerns about its long-term price strength amid challenging market conditions. Time: Mar 17 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: Oceanic Foods Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Oceanic Foods Ltd, a micro-cap player in the FMCG sector, has recently formed a Death Cross as its 50-day moving average (DMA) crossed below the 200-day moving average, signalling a potential shift towards a bearish trend and long-term weakness in the stock’s price momentum. Time: Mar 17 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.description: Porwal Auto Components Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, raising concerns about the stock's medium to long-term momentum and investor sentiment. Time: Mar 17 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: Modi Rubber Ltd Forms Death Cross Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Modi Rubber Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Tyres & Rubber Products sector, has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential deterioration in the stock’s trend and raises concerns about sustained bearish momentum in the near to medium term. Time: Mar 17 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: Power Finance Corporation Ltd Forms Golden Cross, Signalling Potential Bullish Breakout
item.description: Power Finance Corporation Ltd (PFC) has recently formed a Golden Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average (DMA) has crossed above the 200-DMA. This development suggests a potential bullish breakout and a shift in long-term momentum, reinforcing the stock’s improving trend after a period of consolidation. Time: Mar 17 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: Linde India Ltd. Forms Golden Cross, Signalling Potential Bullish Breakout
item.description: Linde India Ltd., a prominent player in the Other Chemical products sector, has recently formed a Golden Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average (DMA) has crossed above the 200-day moving average. This development is widely regarded as a bullish signal, suggesting a potential trend reversal and a shift towards sustained long-term momentum for the mid-cap company. Time: Mar 17 2026 06:00 PM IST
